name: Incident
description: A documented police brutality incident from the 2020 George Floyd protests

id.description: Unique identifier for the incident (format: state-city-number)

name.description: Brief title or summary of the incident
name.example: Student journalist struck by foam bullet

description.description: Detailed description of what occurred during the incident
description.example: A student journalist was struck by a foam bullet while covering protests near downtown.

state.description: US state abbreviation where the incident occurred

geolocation.description: Latitude and longitude coordinates of the incident location

tags.description: Categorical tags describing the type of incident or force used

links.description: Source URLs documenting or referencing the incident

edit_at.description: Direct link to edit this incident record on GitHub
